name: visibility-rules-editor
description: Visual editor for element visibility rules based on user status, device, time, and other conditions
author: Spwig

1.0.1: Refactored to use utility base CSS classes (utility-header, utility-body, utility-footer)
Added dependency on base utility for consistent styling
Uses control-group from utility base for form fields
Uses btn, btn-apply, btn-clear from utility base for buttons
